script:
(Shot 1: Person looking frustrated at a computer)  
🔍"Stuck on a project?"  
(Shot 2: Coffee cup spilling)  
☕️"Thatt just makes it worse!"  
(Shot 3: Quick zoom on a brainstorming book)  
📚"Try this simple trick instead!"  
(Shot 4: Person scribbling ideas)  
📝"Write down your thoughts FAST!"  
(Shot 5: Timer starts counting down)  
⏱️"60 seconds! Don’t overthink it!"  
(Shot 6: Person smiling at the paper)  
n✨"Feel the clarity coming?"  
(Shot 7: Close-up of a lightbulb above their head)  
💡"Ideas are flowing!"  
(Shot 8: High-five with a friend)  
🙌"Get your creativity BACK!"
prompt: A vibrant, fast-paced video style showcasing practical productivity tips with fun animations and relatable scenarios.
